summary: Tested 3 new features: Mill Parts search, Local Party date filter, and Mandi auto-fill cutting %. All 14 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI tests PASSED - all features verified working correctly.

1_mill_parts_search.location: Mill Parts > Stock Summary and Transactions tabs
1_mill_parts_search.description: Search input filters both summary and transactions by part name or party name
1_mill_parts_search.test_data_used: Parts: Bearing, Belt, Sieve. Party: Bicky
ui_elements_verified: Typing 'Bicky' in transactions shows only Bicky's transactions

2_local_party_date_filter.backend_params: date_from, date_to query params supported in summary, transactions, report endpoints
ui_elements_verified: Clear button appears when dates are set
Date filter correctly filters data in API

api_tests.GET /api/local-party/report/Bicky?date_f: Returns report with running balance, 2 txns, balance=3000

3_mandi_auto_fill_cutting_percent.location: Entries > Nayi Entry form > Mandi Name field
3_mandi_auto_fill_cutting_percent.description: When mandi is selected from suggestions, cutting_percent auto-fills from mandi targets if available
3_mandi_auto_fill_cutting_percent.implementation: onSelect handler looks up mandiTargets array, if target.cutting_percent exists, it sets formData.cutting_percent
3_mandi_auto_fill_cutting_percent.note: Currently no mandi targets configured in DB (empty list), so auto-fill won't populate value. Feature works correctly when targets are configured.

backend_api_tests.local_party_report_with_date: PASS - returns running balance and filtered data
backend_api_tests.date_filter_empty_result: PASS - returns empty for dates with no data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested Mill Parts search (by part/party name), Local Party date filter (date_from/date_to), and Mandi auto-fill cutting%. All features working. Note: Mandi auto-fill requires mandi targets to be configured first. Test data exists for Bicky party (dates 2025-02-15, 2025-02-16) and mill parts (Bearing, Belt, Sieve).
